_notes.auto_sync.on_session_start: Pull-only at SessionStart. Adds 1-3s latency on cold cache.
_notes.auto_sync.on_pre_compact: Commit-only before /compact summarizes — captures full context.
_notes.auto_sync.on_post_compact: Full pull-rebase-push after /compact. Triggers AI conflict if remote diverged.
_notes.topic_routing.min_keyword_overlap: Number of common ≥4-char keywords required to route to an existing topic.
_notes.topic_routing.auto_create_threshold: Reserved for future: create new topic only after N unmatched entries on the same theme.
_notes.topic_routing.default_topic: Slug used when no topic matches and no distinctive keywords found.
_notes.embedding.provider: openai | voyage | gemini | none. Auto-detected from API keys.
_notes.recall.wikilink_follow: If top hit is a topic file with [[other-slug]], also surface other-slug top match.
